Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle.
Changelog: v1.0.5.5: add Next Action Tracker — a movable window showing the current job's ST + AoE next action and burst armed/held state (/mytweak tracker); excludes itself from screen capture when detached. v1.0.5.4: Performance Mode now fully disables the hotbar icon-swap hook so icons stay native (real perf gain); combos still resolve on button press. v1.0.5.3: add /tweak slash for silent master toggle, silence all burst hold/resume chat echoes.
